rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Non-depmod Process Modifying modules.dep

rules.rule_text:
title: Non-depmod Process Modifying modules.dep
id: c0bbc749-9ed3-483b-b3ac-7c5732a61fda
status: experimental
description: "Detects unusual process modifying the modules.dep file. The modules.dep\
  \ and modules.dep.bin \nfiles should only be modified by the depmod utility. Part\
  \ of the RedCanary 2024 Threat \nDetection Report.\n"
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/kernel-modules-and-extensions/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2024/03/21
tags:
- attack.persistence
- attack.privilege_escalation
- attack.t1547
- attack.t1547.006
logsource:
  product: linux
  category: file_event
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|startswith: /lib/modules/
    TargetFilename|endswith:
    - /modules.dep
    - /modules.dep.bin
  filter:
    Image|endswith: /depmod
  condition: selection and not filter
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
